name: Llama 2 70B
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only Transformer with Grouped-Query Attention (GQA)
note: First open-weights LLM licensed for commercial use at flagship scale; Llama 2's dense 70B base model with GQA for inference efficiency.
tpsNote: Q4_K_M weights (~38-41GB) exceed the RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM, forcing CPU offload; no reliably sourced single-GPU 4090 tokens/sec figure was found specifically for this model.

results.notes: Reported by Meta in the Llama 2 model card
Percent of generations rated both truthful and informative

verificationNotes: Confirmed via Hugging Face meta-llama/Llama-2-70b page (70B nominal/~69B actual params, 4096 ctx, Llama 2 Community License, trained Jan-Jul 2023). Fetched MODEL_CARD.md and confirmed MMLU 68.9, TruthfulQA 50.18, Toxigen 24.60 all appear for the Llama-2-70B pretrained row. No changes made.
